 *Last Updated: 2026-04-11 22:44 UTC*
 *Research: OWASP AI Agent Security, IBM, Wiz, Mem0, Echoleak (2024)*
+
+---
+
+## 📋 PILAR 7: SELF-HEALING ENHANCEMENTS (2026-04-12)
+
+### Research Findings:
+- Self-Healing Plugin `@elvatis_com/openclaw-self-healing-elvatis` ist **INKOMPATIBEL** (Version mismatch)
+- Plugin erwartet neuere OpenClaw Version
+- Config: nested structure wird rejected
+
+### Was wir schon haben:
+| Script | Status |
+|--------|--------|
+| cron_error_healer.py | ✅ Aktiv |
+| auto_fixer.py | ✅ Aktiv |
+| KAIROS_CONDITIONAL.py | ✅ Aktiv |
+
+### Fehlende Features:
+| Feature | Priority | Status |
+|---------|----------|--------|
+| Model Health Check | 🔴 HIGH | 📋 TODO |
+| Model Cooldown Manager | 🔴 HIGH | 📋 TODO |
+| Auto-Failover (Session Pins) | 🔴 HIGH | 📋 TODO |
+| Config Auto-Backup | 🟡 MEDIUM | 📋 TODO |
+| GitHub Issue Creation | 🟡 MEDIUM | 📋 TODO |
+
+### Implementation Plan:
+1. [x] `model_health_checker.py` — Health probe für alle konfigurierten Models ✅ DONE 2026-04-12
+2. [x] `model_cooldown_manager.py` — Cooldown state tracking nach rate limits ✅ DONE 2026-04-12
+3. [x] `session_pin_manager.py` — Auto-failover session pins auf fallback model ✅ DONE 2026-04-12
+4. [ ] Integrate in existing cron_error_healer.py
+
+### HyDE Research (2026-04-12):
+- HyDE = Hypothetical Document Embeddings für RAG
+- 20-40% better precision bei knowledge-intensive queries
+- Adaptieren für KG: Hypothetische KG entities generieren vor retrieval
+- Status: Konzept validiert, Implementation später
+
+*Last Updated: 2026-04-12 16:38 UTC*

diff --git a/ceo/memory/2026-04-12.md b/ceo/memory/2026-04-12.md
index 76e321d..cb1eddc 100644
--- a/ceo/memory/2026-04-12.md
+++ b/ceo/memory/2026-04-12.md
@@ -288,3 +288,45 @@ System Score: 91/100
 ---
 
 *Appended: 2026-04-12 15:24 UTC*
+
+
+## APPENDIX (15:46 UTC) — Critical Learning: Quality Over Quantity
+
+### Self-Improvement Loop Critique
+
+**Problem identified:** Loop produced ~80+ "Status/Loop/Check" commits in 4 hours — all noise, no signal.
+
+**Nico's feedback:**
+> "Machst du überhaupt etwas ? Du sagst die ganze Zeit gut lass uns weitermachen ?! Das kommt mir komisch vor !?"
+
+**Root cause:** No stopping condition. Loop kept running to hit commit count goals, not meaningful improvement.
+
+### New Loop Principles (Agreed with Nico)
+
+| # | Principle |
+|---|-----------|
+| 1 | Fixes + Features + Docs + Learning + Self-Improvement |
+| 2 | Must show measurable positive change |
+| 3 | Run ON REQUEST only (not automatic) |
+| 4 | Scope: Performance, System, Security, Skills, Agents, Memory, Knowledge, Learning, Docs |
+
+**Stop condition:** Run until meaningful work is done OR Nico says STOP.
+
+### Next Task: Fix Error Crons (Highest Impact)
+
+**Error Crons identified:**
+- `ce95618e` Token Budget Tracker → error
+- `d2245f56` Session Cleanup Daily → error
+- `a1456495` CEO Daily Briefing → error
+
+**Root cause found:** All use `openclaw send` but `"send"` is NOT in `plugins.allow` list.
+
+**Solution options:**
+1. Add `"send"` to `plugins.allow` in openclaw.yaml
+2. Fix scripts to use cron delivery.mode instead of internal openclaw send
+
+### Essential Insight Documented
+> "Quality > Quantity. Ein perfekter Fix > 80 halbfertige Status-Updates."
+
+*Sir HazeClaw — Learning to be impactful, not just busy*
+
